resource_templates.description: Read the same structured export manifest exposed by HTTP.
resource_templates.name: manifest_resource

resource_templates.description: Read the same structured export report exposed by HTTP.
resource_templates.name: report_resource

tools.description: Return safe engine and service capabilities without probing a database.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_capabilities

tools.description: List safe owner-configured profile descriptors; never return credentials.
tools.name: sqlctx_list_profiles

tools.description: Perform a bounded read-only connection test for a named profile.
tools.name: sqlctx_test_profile

tools.description: Run one validated read-only relational SELECT and return masked Markdown.
tools.name: sqlctx_query_data

tools.description: Rediscover retained catalog jobs using exact request fingerprints and cursor paging.
tools.name: sqlctx_list_catalogs

tools.description: Create a resumable two-phase catalog using a caller-scoped idempotency key.
tools.name: sqlctx_create_catalog

tools.description: Get pollable catalog status and complete accounting.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_catalog_status

tools.description: Cooperatively and idempotently cancel a catalog job.
tools.name: sqlctx_cancel_catalog

tools.description: Delete inactive catalog state after request-bound owner approval.
tools.name: sqlctx_delete_catalog

tools.description: Page through preliminary categories; stop only when next_cursor is null.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_category_preview

tools.description: Record materialization intent without narrowing full database analysis.
tools.name: sqlctx_set_materialization_selection

tools.description: Page through analysis or final-materialization sitemap records.
tools.name: sqlctx_list_sitemap

tools.description: Return final-category materialization decisions and exclusions.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_materialization_plan

tools.description: Page through unresolved objects using sanitized evidence only.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_classification_requests

tools.description: Submit validated non-authoritative model suggestions.
tools.name: sqlctx_submit_classification_proposals

tools.description: Persist authoritative resolutions only after server-enforced owner approval.
tools.name: sqlctx_resolve_classifications

tools.description: Rediscover retained exports using request and batch fingerprints.
tools.name: sqlctx_list_exports

tools.description: Queue lean final materialization; omit object IDs to resolve the complete plan server-side.
tools.name: sqlctx_export_batch

tools.description: Return progress, terminal error code, bundle integrity, and safe tooling metadata.
tools.name: sqlctx_get_export_status

tools.description: Cooperatively and idempotently cancel an export.
tools.name: sqlctx_cancel_export

tools.description: Delete an inactive export only after request-bound owner approval.
tools.name: sqlctx_delete_export

tools.description: Compare a complete locally re-read inventory with immutable export manifests.
tools.name: sqlctx_validate_exports

tools.description: Verify safe host-Python and SQLFluff identity without mutation.
tools.name: sqlctx_sqlfluff_status

tools.description: Ensure pinned SQLFluff on the same host interpreter after owner approval if needed.
tools.name: sqlctx_sqlfluff_ensure

tools.description: Update and self-test SQLFluff on the idle host interpreter after owner approval.
tools.name: sqlctx_sqlfluff_update
